const const leaveAPI={list:p=>api.get('/leaves/',{params:p}),create:data=>api.post('/leaves/',data),approve:id=>api.post(`/leaves/${id}/approve/`),reject:id=>api.post(`/leaves/${id}/reject/`)};export const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=u;a.download=name;a.click();URL.revokeObjectURL(u);}export default api;export const
